message:
bench(text): S3-FIFO vs W-TinyLFU vs LRU cache benchmarks (bd-l6yba.4)

Criterion benchmarks comparing throughput and hit rate across three
eviction policies at 1K/10K/100K workload sizes. Workloads: zipfian
(power-law), scan (sequential unique), and mixed (hot set + noise).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,3 +45,7 @@ harness = false
 [[bench]]
 name = "search_bench"
 harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "cache_bench"
+harness = false
